profile.name: Gabriel Riven Wahnich
profile.summary: Computer Science graduate (Distinction, RMIT) focused on AI engineering and full-stack systems. Builds agentic AI applications using the OpenAI Agents SDK and Model Context Protocol, backed by full-stack experience across Python, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Recently shipped a containerised agentic chatbot service to production with multi-process orchestration and structured error handling. Bilingual in English and Spanish.

experience.title: Freelance Software Engineer
experience.description: Melbourne-based commission artist platform offering handmade pet portraits shipped worldwide.
responsibilities: Designed and built a full-stack platform managing ~500 artwork assets, testimonials, and customer enquiries
Developed a secure admin panel using JWT authentication and Argon2 password hashing
Designed and implemented a REST API with NestJS and PostgreSQL (Neon)
Offloaded image storage and delivery to Cloudinary, using URL-based transformations to resize and compress assets dynamically — reducing backend load and improving frontend performance
Built a responsive frontend using React (Vite), Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and Framer Motion
Implemented email handling via Resend to manage and route customer enquiries

experience.title: Software Engineer Internship
experience.description: Early-stage startup building a marketplace platform for musician collaboration.
responsibilities: Designed and shipped an Order History feature end-to-end across web (Next.js) and mobile (Expo)
Built and maintained microservices supporting order data flow
Integrated secure file-download functionality into the Order History interface for cross-artist file sharing
Collaborated via GitHub with branching, pull requests, and code review

experience.title: Systems Assembler and Hardware Technician
experience.description: Fast-paced retail and enterprise environment handling high volumes of custom system builds and hardware support.
responsibilities: Diagnosed and resolved hardware faults across consumer and enterprise systems
Assembled custom PC builds to specification and performed component-level quality testing
Applied BIOS and firmware updates to maintain hardware compatibility and system stability

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science with Distinction

projects.name: AI Portfolio Chatbot
projects.description: An agentic AI service that answers questions about my professional background using tool-calling and structured resume data. Built with the OpenAI Agents SDK and a custom FastMCP server exposing eight resume tools.

projects.name: Vestly
projects.description: A multi-agent financial analysis pipeline that runs four specialist agents (Fundamentals, Sentiment, Risk, Competition) in parallel and a Judge agent that synthesises their findings into an evidence-grounded investment thesis. FastAPI backend on Fly.io, React (Vite) frontend on Vercel. Agents are built on the OpenAI Agents SDK with Pydantic-validated structured outputs and a shared AnalysisAgent base class, drawing research data from yfinance and Finnhub. The Competition agent has its own MCP server (FastMCP over stdio) exposing peer-lookup and research-pack tools, letting it autonomously select 2-3 relevant competitors via Finnhub and fetch comparison data on demand.

interests: Game Development — building small-scale interactive projects with Godot
Football (Soccer) — follower of local A-League and international leagues
